india_trends.title: Prudential Plc to buy 75% Bharti Life stake for ₹3,500 crore, cut ICICI Pru Life holding to 10%
india_trends.summary: The London-based insurer says the move marks a strategic reset in India, as it secures majority control of Bharti Life Insurance while complying with regulations on ICICI Prudential stake reduction.

india_trends.title: JSW Steel’s JVs put it on track to be among top global steelmakers outside China
india_trends.summary: Including planned capacity expansions at BPSL, the tie-ups with Japan's JFE Steel and Korea's POSCO would add about 16 mtpa capacity by 2032, setting it on course to reach 80 mtpa capacity by 2032, according to Jayant Acharya, the chief executive officer and joint managing director of JSW Steel.

india_trends.title: CBSE's three-language policy sparks concerns over timing, logistics
india_trends.summary: New CBSE guidelines for Class 9 language learning have caused concern. Educationists and parents question the timing of the three-language policy. india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea gets promoter support but funding challenge persists
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Idea posted early signs of recovery with stabilising subscribers and higher Arpu, backed by a ₹4,730-crore promoter infusion. However, analysts say large spectrum dues, funding gaps and network expansion needs remain major challenges.

india_trends.summary: The NCLAT has upheld separate insolvency proceedings for Videocon Industries Ltd (VIL) and Videocon Oil Ventures Ltd (VOVL), overturning an NCLT order that had clubbed the two cases. india_trends.title: Reliance Jio IPO: How much-awaited IPO likely to impact Reliance share price?
india_trends.summary: Reliance Jio is reworking its much-awaited IPO into a fully fresh issue of shares, dropping the earlier plan where global investors would have partially sold their stakes.

india_trends.title: What does an import restriction mean for silver investments?
india_trends.summary: India’s move to restrict silver imports and raise duties is expected to push up domestic prices by increasing premiums over global benchmarks.
